2025-26 Memphis Grizzlies Roster and Stats

Previous Season

Record: 25-57, Finished 13th in NBA Western Conference

Coach: Tuomas Iisalo (25-57)

Executive: Zach Kleiman

PTS/G: 114.7 (20th of 30) Opp PTS/G: 120.7 (26th of 30)

SRS: -5.83 (24th of 30) Pace: 101.3 (7th of 30)

Off Rtg: 112.9 (25th of 30) Def Rtg: 118.8 (24th of 30) Net Rtg: -5.9 (24th of 30)

Expected W-L: 27-55 (24th of 30)

Preseason Odds: Championship +12500, Over-Under 39.5

Arena: FedExForum Attendance: 632,000 (30th of 30)

A measure of shooting efficiency that takes into account 2-point field goals, 3-point field goals, and free throws.

An estimate of points produced (players) or scored (teams) per 100 possessions

Offensive Rebound Pct

Offensive Rebound Percentage
An estimate of the percentage of available offensive rebounds a player grabbed while they were on the floor.

Assist Pct

Assist Percentage
An estimate of the percentage of teammate field goals a player assisted while they were on the floor.

Cam Spencer 33.1 (14th)

Triple-Doubles

Triple-Doubles The NBA did not track Triple-Doubles until 1979-80 when Magic Johnson popularized the feat. Nonetheless, we can present Triple-Doubles since 1950-51 when rebounds became an official statistic. A small number may yet be unaccounted for but we're confident in the completeness of the list.
